fin.ai_finance.text: Ability to identify irregularities in employee hours and payroll
Extracted data from invoices is automatically populated into the accounting system, with built-in checks to validate data accuracy before final entry.
Financial documents like invoices and receipts are categorised based on content, with the system adapting to user-defined categories to enhance sorting precision.
The solution extracts relevant information from receipts and invoices in various formats, automatically identifying key data points like dates, amounts, and vendor names.
The solution achieves an accuracy rate of over 95% in invoice processing, determined by cross-referencing processed outputs with manually verified data.
When a user corrects a miscategorised transaction, the system updates its logic and applies similar changes to future entries automatically.

fin.integration_import_export.text: Are the Accounting Management function, Inventory Management function and Sales Management function tightly integrated? E.g. Inventory and Accounting vendor groups are the same, Forecasting (Inventory) data should be linked to Financial reports (Accounting), Inventory Management (Inventory) should be linked to Sales/Delivery order (Sales)
Are the modules above tightly integrated such that information can be pulled from all modules to the dashboard
Can your solution be integrated with user's existing accounting management solution to facilitate processing of employees' payroll
Integration with existing accounting systems for tracking of expenses
Please state the accounting management software that your solution can be integrated with.
Provide a list of accounting systems that can be integrated with.
Sales/delivery orders (Sales) should be linked to customer groups (Accounting) and Sales management (Sales) should be linked to Accounts module (Accounting) )
The solution can connect with accounting systems, allowing automatic synchronisation of financial data and reducing the need for manual input.
Invoice processing: Integrate with company's accounting software to automatically extract relevant data from utility bills and fuel invoices.
